summary: The themes API honors audience presets at read time and echoes excluded-by-label breakdowns without writing new labeling state.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Themes endpoint with end_user_only
checks.expected: Payload includes filtered counts and themes

checks.name: CHECK-02: Include seller changes counts
checks.actual: Included counts changed 31 -> 33 -> 39 across end_user_only, include_seller, include_brand

checks.name: CHECK-03: Excluded-by-label summary
checks.actual: Payload includes excluded_by_label_count and excluded_breakdown such as low_relevance/brand_official/seller_affiliate

checks.name: CHECK-04: Read-time policy only
checks.command: Repeat themes requests then query content_labels for run-755de99fc7
checks.expected: Filter switch does not create new labels or mutate crawl run
checks.actual: content_labels stayed at 77 rows with 1 distinct label_job_id after multiple filter requests; only theme payload changed

checks.name: CHECK-05: Response echoes taxonomy and filter
checks.actual: Responses echo audience_filter values and taxonomy_version=v1
